sentences.arabic: كَانَ عَصْفُورٌ أَبْيَضُ يَعِيشُ فِي شَجَرَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bijela ptica je živjela u velikom stablu.
sentences.translationEn: A white bird lived in a big tree.

sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمٍ بَارِدٍ سَقَطَ ثَلَجٌ كَثِيرٌ وَغَطَّى كُلَّ شَيْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Hladnog dana je palo puno snijega i pokrio je sve.
sentences.translationEn: On a cold day a lot of snow fell and covered everything.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَجِدِ الْعُصْفُورُ طَعَامًا فَصَاحَ بِصَوْتٍ حَزِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Ptica nije mogla naći hranu pa je cvrkutala tužnim glasom.
sentences.translationEn: The bird could not find food and chirped in a sad voice.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَهُ طِفْلٌ وَأَخْرَجَ لَهُ بَعْضَ الْحُبُوبِ عَلَى النَّافِذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete ga je čulo i iznijelo mu na prozor malo zrna.
sentences.translationEn: A child heard it and put some grains on the window for it.
